todo.title: Rebuild favicon.ico with better Windows taskbar resolutions
notes: Most important missing size right now appears to be 24x24 for the Windows taskbar group icon.
When rebuilding favicon.ico, be sure to include at least these embedded sizes: 16x16, 20x20, 24x24, 32x32, 40x40, 48x48, 64x64, 128x128, and 256x256.
After updating the icon, replace both the repo asset copy and the packaged source copy under src/genenote/assets/icon/favicon.ico.
